name: io.github.agenticsrclab/tradeos-public-intel-mcp
title: TradeOS Public Intelligence
description: Source-backed crypto market intelligence, evidence, watchlists, and feedback tools.

environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Optional TradeOS public intelligence API base URL.

environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_PUBLIC_INTEL_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional public-intel app key for attribution and quota confidence.

environmentVariables.name: TRADEOS_ACCOUNT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional account token for user-owned watchlist tools.
